title: ExecutePrompt
description: ExecutePrompt: Command to execute a prompt with a system and user message. Allows for continuous chats by providing previous messages and responses to User and Assistant, respectively.

System.description: System message to be used in the prompt execution.

User.description: User messages within chat thread, from oldest to the latest, should always be one more than Assistant.

Assistant.description: LLM responses within chat thread, from oldest to the latest, should always be one less than User.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
